re3DOS

GTA III — Browser Port

1
Compile re3 to WebAssembly
Run the build script (installs Emscripten + compiles re3):
cd /Volumes/SSD/re3DOS ./build/build.sh
This takes ~20–40 min on first run.
2
Provide GTA III game files
Copy your original GTA III files into build/gta3-assets/ — needs models/, audio/, data/, text/ folders.
3
Start the server
./.venv/bin/python server.py --re3sky_local re3sky --custom_saves
Open http://localhost:8001

re3DOS uses the open-source re3 engine (reverse-engineered GTA III). You must own the original game to provide assets. See build/README.md for full build documentation.

Fullscreen on start
Cloud saves: checking…
re3 source Emscripten
Initializing…
